languages.text: "Клиофа-а-ан!" {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Отринул золотые хоромы... Паства Его... не сатин и шелка... Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду... Слово Его звучит... Звучит! Там, где... обноски... да рабочие комбинезоны. Я веду их... веду..."

"Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock... No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."
languages.original_text: "Клиофа-а-ан!" {n}Он стонет свое имя, но взгляд тут же становится обескураженным — он уже забыл его вновь.{/n} "Отринул золотые хоромы... Паства Его... не сатин и шелка... Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду... Слово Его звучит... Звучит! Там, где... обноски... да рабочие комбинезоны. Я веду их... веду..."

No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

languages.text: 「クレオファネス。私は布に呼ばれたが、金色の宮殿を去った。私の羊は、絹やサテンで覆われた者だけではない。彼の言葉は、古着や作業服を着た者にも届けられるべきだ。私は彼らを導く... 私は彼らを導く...」
languages.original_text: "Cleophanes. I was called to the cloth, but I turned away from golden halls... My flock are not only those clad in satin and silk — His word must be brought to those who wear cast-offs and coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

traits.locale_text: 「クレオファネス。私は布に呼ばれたが、金色の宮殿を去った。私の羊は、絹やサテンで覆われた者だけではない。彼の言葉は、古着や作業服を着た者にも届けられるべきだ。私は彼らを導く... 私は彼らを導く...」

languages.text: “克莱奥法内——斯！”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“转身离开了黄金殿堂……去指引祂的子民……不穿绸缎，不穿丝绸……我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……我们聆听祂的圣言……我们听见了！在那个地方……人们穿着……旧衣和工装……我引领他们……我在引领……”
languages.original_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock... No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

traits.locale_text: “克莱奥法内——斯！”{n}他拖长声音喊出自己的名字，但困惑很快再次蒙上他的目光——他似乎又忘记了。{/n}“转身离开了黄金殿堂……去指引祂的子民……不穿绸缎，不穿丝绸……我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可我依然在前行……我们聆听祂的圣言……我们听见了！在那个地方……人们穿着……旧衣和工装……我引领他们……我在引领……”

languages.text: « Cleophaneees ! » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Je me suis détourné des salles dorées pour guider Son troupeau... Pas de satin, pas de soie, mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... Nous entendons Sa parole... Nous l'entendons ! En ces lieux où ils sont vêtus de guenilles... Je les mène... Je les... »
languages.original_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock... No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

traits.locale_text: « Cleophaneees ! » {n}Il prononce son nom dans un long grognement, puis la confusion revient lui embrumer le regard : il semble l'avoir de nouveau oublié.{/n} « Je me suis détourné des salles dorées pour guider Son troupeau... Pas de satin, pas de soie, mes sandales sont en lambeaux, mais je continue à marcher... Nous entendons Sa parole... Nous l'entendons ! En ces lieux où ils sont vêtus de guenilles... Je les mène... Je les... »

languages.text: «¡Cleophaneees!». {n}Pronuncia el nombre con un prolongado gemido, pero la confusión pronto vuelve a nublar su mirada y vuelve a olvidarlo.{/n} «Rechazado en los salones dorados... para guiar a Su grey... sin satén ni seda... Mis sandalias están hechas jirones, pero sigo andando... Oímos Su palabra... ¡La oímos! En el lugar donde... llevan despojos y... monos, los lidero... Lidero...».
languages.original_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock... No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

traits.locale_text: «¡Cleophaneees!». {n}Pronuncia el nombre con un prolongado gemido, pero la confusión pronto vuelve a nublar su mirada y vuelve a olvidarlo.{/n} «Rechazado en los salones dorados... para guiar a Su grey... sin satén ni seda... Mis sandalias están hechas jirones, pero sigo andando... Oímos Su palabra... ¡La oímos! En el lugar donde... llevan despojos y... monos, los lidero... Lidero...».

languages.text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "O'nun sürüsüne rehberlik etmek için... Altın salonlardan yüz çevirdi... Saten yok, ipek yok... Çarıklarım paramparça oldu ama hâlâ yürüyorum... O'nun sözünü duyuyoruz... Duyuyoruz! Eski püskü şeyler ve... Tulumlar giydikleri... O yerde. Onlara liderlik ediyorum... Liderlik ediyorum..."
languages.original_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock... No satin, no silk... My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... We hear His word... We hear it! In the place where... they wear cast-offs and... coveralls. I lead them... I lead..."

traits.locale_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}Adını uzun, iniltili bir şekilde söylüyor ancak sonra bakışları anında bulanıklaşıyor. Görünüşe göre adını yine unutmuş.{/n} "O'nun sürüsüne rehberlik etmek için... Altın salonlardan yüz çevirdi... Saten yok, ipek yok... Çarıklarım paramparça oldu ama hâlâ yürüyorum... O'nun sözünü duyuyoruz... Duyuyoruz! Eski püskü şeyler ve... Tulumlar giydikleri... O yerde. Onlara liderlik ediyorum... Liderlik ediyorum..."

languages.text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}Er sagt seinen Namen mit einem gedehnten Stöhnen, ehe Verwirrung seines Verstand trübt ... er scheint ihn schon wieder vergessen zu haben.{/n} "Fern der goldenen Hallen ... um Seine Herde zu lenken ... Kein Satin, keine Seide ... Meine Sandalen sind zerschunden, aber ich gehe noch ... Wir hören Sein Wort ... Wir hören es! An dem Ort, an dem sie ... Lumpen tragen und ... Overalls. Ich führe sie an ... Ich führe ..."
languages.original_text: "Cleophaneees!" {n}He speaks his name in a drawn-out groan, but then confusion immediately clouds his gaze — he seems to have forgotten it again.{/n} "Turned away from golden halls... to guide His flock...
